title: Original Research
description: As a Journeyman, you must conduct original magical research and present your findings to the Arcane Circle council. Choose your specialization - Elemental Magic, Illusion, Necromancy, or Enchantment - and demonstrate mastery by creating a unique magical effect or discovering new applications of existing spells.

objectives.notes: Dialogue choice: Elemental, Illusion, Necromancy, or Enchantment

objectives.description: Conduct magical experiments in the research lab
Document your findings in a research journal
Present your thesis to the Arcane Circle council

notes: First Journeyman quest. Player chooses specialization path. Rewards depend on choice: Elemental=spell, Illusion=spell, Necromancy=spell, Enchanting=recipe.
